notes:
v2.6.59 — CLASSIC MODE: bring back the free, active v2.6.21 feel

- New 'Classic Mode' checkbox at the top of the Filters panel
- When ON, the heavy filters relax to trade more freely like v2.6.21 best:
  * H1 Direction Lock OFF
  * No daily trade cap (unlimited)
  * 2-touch trendlines allowed
  * Strict momentum/MA200-slope filters OFF
  * Lower confidence + trendline quality gate
- H4 direction block stays ON (only blocks obviously wrong-way trades)
- OFF by default: existing users keep the selective mode until they tick it
- Startup log clearly shows CLASSIC MODE ON when active
